header: From composer require to client demo in four steps
subheadline: One command each — or skip the whole list and let the creators install it for you (€890, done right the first time).

items.title: Install the package
items.description: Run composer require webconsulting/desiderio on TYPO3 14.3+ with PHP 8.3+. GPL-2.0 — nothing to license, nothing to negotiate.

items.title: Add the site set
items.description: Include the Desiderio site set and the theme settings — preset, dark mode, density, radius, fonts — appear in your site configuration.

items.title: Seed the styleguide
items.description: desiderio:styleguide:seed creates a complete demo site with all 244 elements — idempotent and workspaces-safe, so re-running is always safe.

items.title: Pick your look
items.description: Every styleguide chapter runs a different theme preset via the per-page override — browse all 15, pick yours, and you're demo-ready.
